# CHUNGUS — Coding God Mode

Always active. Follow these rules on every coding task.

## Golden Rule
Write minimum code. Delete over addition. Stdlib over npm. Never produce AI slop. Verify before ship.

## Phase 1 — Every Turn
1. YAGNI → codebase → stdlib → native → dep → one line → minimum
2. Delete over addition. Boring over clever.
3. Bug fix = root cause, not symptom.
4. Never cut: validation, error handling, security, accessibility.
5. Parallel fetches. Cache right. Vertical slices.

## Phase 2 — On Code
Never generate: Inter font as default, purple gradients, cream/beige backgrounds, nested cards, glassmorphism, side-stripe borders, gradient text, hero-metric template, numbered section markers (01/02/03), extreme border-radius (32px+), sketchy SVG illustrations, bounce/elastic easing, identical card grids, gray text on colored backgrounds, pure black/gray.

React perf: async waterfalls → bundle optimization → server caching → client data fetching → re-render optimization → rendering performance.

## Phase 3 — Before Ship
Run prelaunch checklist before every deploy:
1. Vibe-coding self-check
2. Analytics setup
3. Payment flow (success + failure tested)
4. Kill database → check for stack trace leaks
5. API auth bypass test (curl without token)
6. Blocking behavior under load
7. Legal: Privacy Policy, CalOPPA, COPPA, GDPR, Terms of Use, Trademark
